title: Page Recommendations
description: Recommend pages to user_id=1 that are liked by friends of user 1 but not already liked by user 1.
constraints: (user1_id, user2_id) is the primary key of Friendship — friendship is stored with user1_id < user2_id
(user_id, page_id) is the primary key of Likes
Result must not include duplicates (use DISTINCT)
key_concept: Multi-step: find friends (bidirectional), find pages liked by friends, exclude already liked pages.

hints.L1: Step 1: find all friends of user 1 (bidirectional). Step 2: pages liked by those friends. Step 3: exclude pages already liked by user 1.
hints.L2: Friends: UNION of (user2_id WHERE user1_id=1) and (user1_id WHERE user2_id=1).
hints.L3: SELECT DISTINCT l.page_id AS recommended_page FROM Likes l WHERE l.user_id IN (SELECT user2_id FROM Friendship WHERE user1_id=1 UNION SELECT user1_id FROM Friendship WHERE user2_id=1) AND l.page_id NOT IN (SELECT page_id FROM Likes WHERE user_id=1)

optimal_solution:
SELECT DISTINCT l.page_id AS recommended_page FROM Likes l
WHERE l.user_id IN (
  SELECT user2_id FROM Friendship WHERE user1_id = 1
  UNION
  SELECT user1_id FROM Friendship WHERE user2_id = 1
)
AND l.page_id NOT IN (SELECT page_id FROM Likes WHERE user_id = 1);
